en: Last Sunday saw the U.S. men's hockey team win gold only for this to happen.
ko: 지난 일요일 미국 남자 하키팀이 금메달을 땄는데 이런 일이 벌어졌어.

en: A wild scene in the locker room, with FBI director Kash Patel even spotted celebrating
ko: 라커룸에서 난리가 났는데 FBI 국장 캐시 파텔까지 팀과 축하하며 맥주를 벌컥벌컥 마시는 모습이 포착됐어.

en: with the team, appearing to chug a beer before raising the bottle in the air, spraying it across the locker room.
-♪ I'm on my way to the game... -♪ -♪ I'm on my way to the game... -♪
-♪ I'm on my way to the game... -♪ Yeah, that is the director of the FBI
looking like a little kid who won a prize for collecting the most canned goods and got to go into the locker room.
ko: 통조림 가장 많이 모아서 상 받고 라커룸에 들어간 꼬마 같아.

en: Also, for what it's worth, he didn't chug a beer, then spray it across the locker room.
ko: 참고로 맥주를 원샷하고 뿌린 게 아니야. 원샷에 성공하면 뿌릴 게 없잖아.

en: A successful chug would render the bottle unsprayable.
What he basically did there was drink a beer weed and then kind of fling his backwash around.
ko: 그가 한 건 기본적으로 맥주를 마시고 남은 침 섞인 걸 뿌린 거야. 어쨌든

en: Anyway, it was fun while it lasted, but it's official, hockey sucks dick now,
ko: 재밌긴 했지만 공식적으로 하키는 이제 별로야. 안타깝게도 좋은 의미가 아니라

en: and sadly, not in the hot way.
